calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Asset To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Advanced From Apr-28-15 To Mar-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Asset To Trust
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Asset To Trust
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elisabeth Hanowsky for (petitioner & trustee) Maria Gonzalez.

Ms. Hanowsky stated that the petitioner and the lender were concerned about the court proceeding, that she would need a 2 week continuance, that this is the first time they have been asked for the names and addresses and that an amendment will be filed. Ms. Hanowsky also stated that the code was not clear regarding notice to minors, that the parents have stated they will waive notice, that both the parents and minors can sign the waiver or that notice will be sent. The court directed Ms. Hanowsky to CRC 7.902 requiring notice to everyone. The petition for order confirming asset to trust was continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Ex Parte Petition To Advance Hearing Date On Petition For Order Confirming Asset To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
